title: 你养宠物吗？
description_uz: «Uy hayvoning bormi?» — do'sting bilan mushuk, uni boqish va parvarish haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog egalik haqida so'rash, miqdor va chastotani aytish va maslahat berishni mashq qiladi. Yoqimli mavzu va kundalik foydali so'zlar. Takrorlab o'rganib, gapirishga ishonch hosil qilish uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «У тебя есть домашнее животное?» — разговор с другом о кошке, её кормлении и уходе. Этот диалог отрабатывает вопросы о наличии, указание количества и частоты и советы. Приятная тема и полезная повседневная лексика. Отлично подходит для шэдоуинга и уверенности в речи.
description_en: «Do you have any pets?» — a chat with a friend about a cat, feeding it, and looking after it. This dialogue practises asking what someone has, stating amounts and frequency, and giving advice. A pleasant topic with useful everyday words. Great for shadowing and building speaking confidence.

sentences.pinyin: Yǎng, wǒ yǎng le yì zhī māo.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Tā kě ài ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很可爱！是白色的，它叫小花。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn kě ài! Shì bái sè de, tā jiào Xiǎo Huā.
sentences.text_translation: Juda suyukkina! Oq rangda, ismi Xiaohua.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень милая! Она белая, зовут Сяохуа.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very cute! It's white; it's called Xiaohua.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 一岁了，它很小但是很聪明。
sentences.pinyin: Yí suì le, tā hěn xiǎo dàn shì hěn cōng ming.
sentences.text_translation: Bir yoshda, kichkina lekin juda aqlli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ей год, она маленькая, но очень умная.
sentences.text_translation_en: It's one year old; it's small but very smart.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā xǐ huan chī shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What does it like to eat?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Xǐ huan chī yú hé māo liáng.
sentences.text_translation: Baliq va mushuk ozuqasini yeyishni yoqtiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Любит есть рыбу и кошачий корм.
sentences.text_translation_en: It likes eating fish and cat food.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tā měi tiān shuì de duō ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Does it sleep a lot every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很多，一天睡十几个小时。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn duō, yì tiān shuì shí jǐ ge xiǎo shí.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'p, kuniga o'n soatdan ortiq uxlaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Много, спит больше десяти часов в день.
sentences.text_translation_en: A lot, it sleeps over ten hours a day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xiǎng yǎng yì zhī māo.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to have a cat too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好啊，养猫不难，而且很好玩。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a, yǎng māo bù nán, ér qiě hěn hǎo wán.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, mushuk boqish qiyin emas, va juda qiziqarli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично, завести кошку несложно, и это очень весело.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great, keeping a cat isn't hard, and it's a lot of fun.
sentences.speaker: B
